revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
|<hr style="height:{{{1}}}px" />
|<hr />
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
|<hr style="height:{{{1}}}px" />
|<hr />
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
|<hr style="height:{{{1}}}px" />
|<hr />
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hr here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Hr for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
<includeonly>{{#if:{{{1|}}}
|<hr style="height:{{{1}}}px" />
|<hr />
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage and interwikis to Wikidata. -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24938264069|time triggered pipeline]]
